FOR MEENA LAGNA: Budha in the 4t"' or the 7111 house confers
this Yoga. Such nativM are successful in life and they respect religion
and ancient customs and traditions. They are devoted to God and
preceptors. But they often prove obstinate and setfish. They possess
good personality and they make friends of all very soon. They also enjoy
all comforts and protection from parents.
Budha in the 1"' house generally confers high effidency In fine arts.
But people born in Pisces ascendant with Mercury in the 7111 house do
not shine well. They become avaricious. jealous and d:isappoilted in
kwe affairs.
